critic_raw:
Issue 1: F1 on 14 finding labels does not cover full report quality scope for the deployment use case.
Issue 2: 87% edit distance reduction is not a proxy for radiologist review burden.
Issue 3: No controlled blinded workflow study measuring time to finalize and error rates.
defender_raw: Concede Issue 3 (controlled study missing). Partial concede Issue 1 (scope gap is real). Partial rebuttal Issue 2 (edit distance is suggestive). Recommend staged deployment with concurrent workflow study.
adjudication_raw: Round 1: 3 issues, defender concedes 2, partial rebuttal on Issue 2. Round 2: Issue 2 resolved as requiring controlled study evidence. All 3 resolved. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.
all_issues_raised: Issue 1: finding-label scope vs full report quality
Issue 2: edit distance vs review burden

empirical_test.condition: Blinded reader study measuring finalization time, errors, and acceptability
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: No net time savings or non-inferior errors not achieved
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Significant time savings with non-inferior errors and strong acceptability
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Time savings for simple studies but not complex ones
